programme.title: Hart to Hart
programme.desc: A friend of Jonathan Harts is killed in a motor accident just after he has left a health farm apparently committing suicide There was no warning of him being troubled so the Harts go undercover to find out what happened at the farm

programme.title: Cagney Lacey
programme.desc: The detectives do their best to recover a stolen bike stolen from a handicapped girl meanwhile Harvey hires a cleaning lady for Lacey

programme.title: Starsky and Hutch
programme.desc: Starsky and Hutch are in Las Vegas to catch a serial killer who has strangled a string of chorus girls What they dont realize is the prime suspect is an old high-school friend of Hutchs

programme.title: Airwolf
programme.desc: Hawke agrees to help his nephew with a missing-person case which quickly leads to a dangerous drug-smuggling ring

programme.title: Friday the 13th The Series
programme.desc: Ryan and Micki disguise themselves as monks to retrieve a mysterious pen kept in an ancient monastery

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: Sonia and Lou find themselves in the middle of nowhere in a tooth-and-nail fight with a trio of nerdy stargazers Froy and Sonia find a cooperative old man to be a hassle after agreeing to let him get his stuff out of his cluttered car and Lou and Matt go on a repo to interrupt a shady car sale and find themselves caught in the middle of an elaborate police sting operation

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: Froy and Sonia are overwhelmed by a swarm of cheerleaders; Matt and Froy interrupt a father and son bonding session gone wrong; the team heads to the raceway to prove they still have what it takes

programme.title: Sheriff of Tombstone
programme.desc:
Roy Rogers and George Gabby Hayes in Sheriff of Tombstone 1941
The mayor has sent for a gunslinger who though appearing to clean up the town is really to be the mayors means of taking the town over When Roy and Gabby arrive in Tombstone Roy is mistaken for the gunslinger Just as Roy is ready to expose the mayor the real gunslinger shows up

programme.title: Billy the Kid Returns
programme.desc: Rogers plays a lookalike to the dead Billy The Kid and restores the tranquility of Lincoln County after subduing the criminal element

programme.title: Rim of the Canyon
programme.desc: ene Autrys stolen horse turns up in a ghost town where Gene goes after he is left stranded during a stagecoach race

programme.title: Addams 212
programme.desc: Addams 212

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: The McCoys find out that they are three months behind on their mortgage payments and will lose the farm if they cant come up with the money Grandpa fears that he will have to sell a 200 year old flintlock family rifle to get the payment

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: Kate wants to discipline Hassie and Little Luke for bad grades and skipping school but Grandpa thinks she is being too tough So Kate lets Grandpa takes over raising the kids

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Wilbur promises a magician that he will take care of his elephant for a few days and Eds not too thrilled with the idea Meanwhile Kay brings home one wrong dog too many so Roger moves into a motel

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Wilbur and Roger buy the contract of a professional heavyweight wrestler

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Gabe Fenway a sharecropper for local landlord Preston plans to run his quarterhorse Sapphire in a local horse race Mark also plans to race his horse Blueboy in the race Preston who wants to keep all of Fenways crops believes Marks horse can beat Fenways and tricks Fenway into betting his crop against Prestons 1000 that Mark will win And to make sure that Mark wins Preston has a plan to make sure that Fenway doesnt make it to the race

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas hires a new ranch hand then learns that the man had just been released from prison for manslaughter He believes the man has turned over a new leaf and wants to start a new life but his--and the townspeoples--suspicions are aroused when a local rancher is murdered during a robbery

programme.title: Gunsmoke S08E28 I Call Him Wonder
programme.desc: Gunsmoke S08E28 I Call Him Wonder

programme.title: Bonanza 322
programme.desc: Bonanza 322

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Jim ans Artie are transporting an elderly prisoner and stumble across a seemingly haunted mansion where the walls echo with a womans cries and they cant escape

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Dragnet

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Dragnet

programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.desc: A death on a diving barge that Dr Kimble works on makes the owner want to get rid of Kimble so he cant testify to what happened

programme.title: Freddys Nightmares
programme.desc: A groom to be gets a lesson in monogamy from the stripper from hell at his bachelor party and then his bride is overwhelmed with suspicion and mistrust and busts married men who cheat due to having caught her father step-out on mom when she was a child

programme.title: Tales from Crypt
programme.desc: In a research lab when two colleagues accidentally inject an experimental virus into their sleazy boss that will eventually kill him he tries to get revenge on them believing it was no accident

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: Danny Darwin learns that his new tattoo might be more than just a tattoo

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: Faded playwright Arthur Brown uses electronic equipment to record private chats of other people as inspiration for his work His subject Diane is having an affair with Carla Magnuson When Dianes husband finds out everyone is in danger

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: Unethical psychiatrist Dr Peter Milne gets romantically involved with unstable Sara Kendal His manipulation of her mind and emotions makes her illness worsen When she cant tell dreams from reality he becomes her rages target

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric wounded by Alamo Joe is saved by a young boy fascinated by monsters werewolves in particular But things get hairy when Moms abusive boyfriend starts slapping her and her son around and Eric saves the day

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric locates Otto Renfield a crippled old sailor who knows Skorzeny and promises to help Eric find him But Renfield betrays Eric and traps him in the hold of his ship for Skorzeny

programme.title: Forever Knight
programme.desc: A figure from Nicks past complicates a murder investigation forcing him to choose between reconciling his past and preventing yet another murder

programme.title: Friday the 13th The Series
programme.desc: Ryan suspects a news anchor of murder but the man has a solid alibi that makes it nearly impossible to prove he is the culprit

programme.title: The Strange and Deadly Occurance
programme.desc: Something or someone haunts a couples Robert Stack Vera Miles new home in the country

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: Freddys Nightmares
programme.desc: A young football star begins to have nightmares about a serial killer called The Springwood Chopper after finding his last victim Each dream reveals more of the killer until he is blamed for the killings Now his girlfriend begins to experience the same dreamswho is the killer

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: Gilligan reels in a crate of vegetable seeds from the lagoon but fails to notice the warning on the crate that the seeds are radioactive

programme.title: Real McCoys S04E21
programme.desc: Real McCoys S04E21

programme.title: Real McCoys S02E10
programme.desc: Real McCoys S02E10

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: Max is assigned to protect the winner of the Miss USA contest

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: An Arabian prince is protected by Max and an Israeli agent

programme.title: BJ and the Bear
programme.desc: BJs truck is hijacked by three beautiful sisters They need BJs rig and his help in order to make a big moonshine run that will raise money for their ailing fathers operation

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Wilbur is all set to enjoy a weeks vacation relaxing at home but his plans are ruined when his overbearing Aunt Martha and her talking parrot unexpectedly drop by for a prolonged visit

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: While Mister Ed phones in racing tips to Pimlico Race Course the Posts and the Addisons play Find The Statue

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: Hogans efforts to help a German baroness to escape are thwarted by Klink who has arranged for the transfer of a British prisoner who is senior to Colonel Hogan

programme.title: Hogans Hereos
programme.desc: When a British commando unit is captured before they can blow up a crucial German ammo dump Hogan and his men attempt to finish the job

programme.title: McHales Navy
programme.desc: Gruber and the guys try to make some money with some phony pearl oysters but their scheme backfires when a greedy Binghamton takes over their operation Then when Chief Urulu muscles in on Binghamtons business McHale and The Crew put a stop to the whole operation by taking advantage of an old native superstition and some Japanese technology

programme.title: McHales Navy
programme.desc: Major complications develop when the guys send a chapter of Parkers war novel - Including a highly fictionalized account of his sinking of the biggest battleship in the Japanese fleet - To Parkers hometown girlfriend in an attempt to help him win her heart

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: In the first of the 3 part sea maneuvers Gomer sneaks a cat aboard a Navy ship unaware there is sensitive Petty Chief Officer who throws all Contraband overboard

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: Part 2 of sea maneuvers has Pyle repeatedly goofing up Carters mission

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: Mr Howell names the other castaways as beneficiaries in his will But he then fears they may be trying to kill him for their inheritance when in reality they are throwing a surprise party for him

programme.title: Vega
programme.desc: While trying to spend a romantic Christmas with Rocket in the mountains Dans long lost daughter shows up He finds that he did know her mother 12 years ago and she Jill Whelan is 11 and a half

programme.title: Hart to Hart
programme.desc: Freeways got a new girlfriend and when her master is killed Freeway disappears with the gun -- but doesnt have it when he gets home

programme.title: Newhart
programme.desc: Everyone gets the measles and Stef ends up taking care of them while Michael can only talk to her through the front door of the Inn or by phone George runs such a high fever that Stef calls the doctor to come in an emergency

programme.title: Newhart
programme.desc: When the previous owners of the Stratford Inn become jealous of the inns new success they try to scare everyone into thinking the Inn is haunted in hopes of getting the Loudens to sell the Inn back to them

programme.title: Major Dad
programme.desc: Camp Hollister Marines must do double duty after the civilian workforce strikes over lay offs and budget cuts After Polly finds a 900 number on the phone bill and the number is no longer in service she tries to find out whom did it and why

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: Gilligan rescues a native woman from drowning which according her custom makes her his slave But soon a fellow tribesman comes to the island and challenges Gilligan for her in a fight to the death

programme.title: Baywatch Nights
programme.desc: Frances Sandreen a cosmetic mogul hires Mitch Garner and Ryan to investigate her son Todds involvement with a band of roller-skating burglars that have been robbing peoples apartments and slipping away at night

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: Things get a lot more complicated for the team when Sonia snaps and puts herself on the business end of a knife and the gangbanger wielding it Froy and Sonia wind up in the middle of a relationship dispute with an absent-minded professor whos got too many cars and too many girlfriends Matt and Froy confront a debtor with a tiny motorcycle and an enormous mean streak and Sonia and Lyndah find themselves in the middle of a gang dispute gone horribly awry

programme.title: Operatino Repo
programme.desc: The repo team confronts the toughest challenge yet one-on-one interviews with an anger management specialist Lyndah and Froy head to the Hollywood Hills to find a luxury sedan

programme.title: Missing in Action 2
programme.desc: Prequel to the first Missing In Action set in the early 1980s it shows the capture of Colonel Braddock during the Vietnam war in the 1970s and his captivity with other American POWs in a brutal prison camp and his plans to escape

programme.title: Missing in Action 3
programme.desc: Braddock mounts a one-man assault to free his wife and son who are still being held in a Vietnam prison camp

programme.title: The Dukes of Hazzard
programme.desc: Old moonshine runners Uncle Jesse and Boss decide to settle who is better once and for all in a race in nearby Hatchapee County However both of them have to beware of Hatchapee County Sheriff Emmitt Loomis while Uncle Jesse should be doubly concerned about Boss scheme to switch water with moonshine

programme.title: Hercules 108
programme.desc: Hercules 108

programme.title: Earth Final Conflict
programme.desc: When the mother ship hits dark matter the ship dos not begin to heal itself Zoor is left in an unconscious state and Sandoval takes control He decides it is time to liberate the Earth from the Taelons

programme.title: War of the Worlds
programme.desc: The Martians attempt to take over a military base that has been used as a secure storage area for much of the information regarding the 1953 invasion In particular they are seeking the location of Martians who are still in hibernation waiting to rejoin the invasion

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: A young loner who believes he is a vampire is accused of murdering his mothers boyfriend

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: After seemingly having no interest for so many episodes what happened to Jim Tressa is suddenly in Peru and sidetracked by a voice from her past on a radio

programme.title: Space 1999
programme.desc: A wandering energy force inhabits the body of Alpha technician Anton Zoref turning him into an energy absorbing being

programme.title: The Horror at 37000 Feet
programme.desc: An invisible demon in the cargo hold of a jet airliner terrorizes the passengers

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: The Dukes of Hazzard
programme.desc: Boss unveils his new ally His college-educated nephew Hughie Hogg Hughie turns out to be even more corrupt than his uncle proving it with a scheme to frame Uncle Jesse in a car-stripping ring

programme.title: Young 120
programme.desc: Young 120

programme.title: Lonesome Dove Outlaw Years
programme.desc: Lonesome Dove Outlaw Years

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: A supposedly reformed sex offender is being brainwashed by his psychiatrist into believing he has committed murder

programme.title: Mission Impossible
programme.desc: Briggs poses as an American tourist and subjects himself to a show trial in order to discredit a public prosecutor attempting to seize absolute power in his country

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Friday and Gannon investigate a series of burglaries that are taking place during the day and the victims are those with a recent wedding or death in the family A senior citizen uses the paper to find homes that are empty during the day

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: An ex-con who places an ad in a newspaper gets a reply referring to making a killing for 1000 He turns the reply over to Friday and Gannon who investigate the possibility that the replier is soliciting murder

programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.desc: A diplomats slip lands Kimble in the only place he cant be re-captured a Washington DC embassy Dr Kimble ministers to the ambassador from a newly democratized African nation when the emissary is almost flattened by a DC cab Everything looks cozy for the fugitive whos in town to court an appeal specialist - especially bunking down the hall from the legations man-eater secretary

programme.title: BIg Valley
programme.desc: The sociopathic son of a neighbor recently returned from away stirs up serious trouble for the Barclays

programme.title: Cheyenne
programme.desc: When a young boy is trapped in a cave-in the locals think the Sioux took him in retribution when Cheyennes Sioux friend is found with the boys horse Cheyenne must prove the truth but a hardcore sheriff doesnt believe him

programme.title: Young Riders
programme.desc: Young Riders

programme.desc: Lets Go Thailand Sights and Sounds Ep 003

programme.desc: Taxi Karaoke - Short Film

programme.title: Bionic Ever After
programme.desc: Steve Austin and Jaime Summers are about to get married However before they can something is happening to Jaime It seems like her bionics are failing and no one knows whats wrong with her It seems that someone has been doing something to her who and why At the same time an old friend of Steves is being held prisoner by some terrorists and Steve needing to take his mind off Jaime offers to go and help

programme.title: Reach For the Sky
programme.desc: Biopic of RAF Group Captain Douglas Bader who after having lost both legs flew a British fighter plane during WWII

programme.title: The Black Tent
programme.desc: In the African desert a British soldier romances the native chiefs daughter and helps the tribe fight off a Nazi attack

programme.title: Attack Force Nam
programme.desc: A group of Australian commandos launch a secret mission against Japanese forces in World War II

programme.title: Snake In The Eagles Shadow
programme.desc: Snake In The Eagles Shadow

programme.title: Lion of the Desert
programme.desc: Set during the reign of Mussolini this epic tale revolves around Libyan leader Omar Mukhtar Omar an Arab Muslim rebel takes on the Italian attack which is directed towards conquering Libya

programme.title: Mazes and Monsters
programme.desc: Four college students become immersed in fantasy role-playing games causing tragic results; based on Rona Jaffes book

programme.desc: Construction workers Clint Walker Carl Betz Neville Brand battle an unmanned bulldozer energized by an alien force

programme.title: The Heart Hayes Interview
programme.desc: Join me as I sit down with the beautiful actress Heart Hayes Hear how keeping her standards high is the only option Also in the episode I chat it up with former Supreme Susaye Green And Businessman Mr Johnboy Watts

programme.title: The Empress Interview
programme.desc: Join me as the lovely Empress returns to the Sherard Show as a new mother and hit maker

programme.title: The Mel Carter Interview
programme.desc: The last of the great ones Mr Mel Carter returns to the show to speak about Sam Cooke Dean Martin and one person youll never believe he worked with

programme.title: The Kendall Ferguson Interview
programme.desc: The hilarious Chicago Comedian Kendall Ferguson returns to the show to talk about his new book and why he needs to stop stealing

programme.title: The ZOCHI Exclusive Interview
programme.desc: My family has osterized me for being queer Meet the African princess whose gender preferences has cost her her family

programme.title: The DC Glenn Exclusive Interview
programme.desc: Meet the man who created a 90s anthem that set the trend for Hip Hop Music today

programme.title: The April Taylor Interview
programme.desc: Join me as I sit down with the lady whose upcoming celebrity tell all book will blow your mind Meet the lovely Ms April Taylor

programme.title: The Cynda Williams Interview
programme.desc: Meet the lady who became a star in the 1990s hit movie Mo Betta Blues Hear how selling herself out to become rich was and still isnt an option

programme.title: The Herculoids

programme.title: Jayce and The Wheeled Warriors
programme.desc: Jayce follows a clue to Audric and meets up with the gambler Vendetta who has a tape regarding his father but Jayce has to win it in a game It is a trap laid by Saw Boss Vendetta plays a game with Herc to settle an old debt of Hercs

programme.title: Jayce and The Wheeled Warriors
programme.desc: Gar lies to his son and daughter Octo and Seena saying Audric stole the root that he developed and that Jayce has taken credit for everything Gar is taken by Saw Boss and instructs Octo to get help from the Lightning League

programme.title: MASK
programme.desc: An explorer discovers an ancient Mayan City where giant stones become weightless under the full moonlight He sells this information to Miles Mayhem while Matt Trakker mounts his own excursion to the same location

programme.title: MASK
programme.desc: Every sail and all the sail-makers in Reykjavík have been confiscated by VENOM who play to raise the city from its foundations to find the lost fleet hidden beneath

programme.title: Teknoman
programme.desc: Labyrinth of Death

programme.title: Teknoman
programme.desc: Invasion

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: During the Simon Belmont Awards the Poltergeist King says that Trevor Belmont who is Simon Belmonts grandfather is a coward which makes Simon worried until him and Captain N get advice from a wizard

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: After playing a riddle game Captain N Princess Lana and Simon get a call from Mayor Squaresly that Tetris is in trouble so they go and check it out while the Puzzle King plans to rule Tetris

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: Dungeon Master is captured by an evil lord working for Venger The kids must find Dungeon Master and free him before its too late

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: The kids learn of a magic river that can get them home On their way to the river however Eric accidentally turns himself into an ugly bogbeast The team must reverse the spell on Eric before the rivers magic runs out

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Gadget Penny and Brain head to an island in the Pacific Ocean where MAD plan to explode an underwater bomb

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Quimby sends Gadget to stop MAD from releasing millions in counterfeit money

programme.title: Challenge of the GoBots
programme.desc: The Guardians try to help a planet whose elfin inhabitants have been conquered by the Renegades who have stolen the elves amazingly powerful Tramulet

programme.title: Challenge of the GoBots
programme.desc: The Trindles recover their Tramulet with the Guardians help and turn Cy-Kills plans against him
